primary_archetype.name: The Engineer
primary_archetype.definition: A rational builder of systems who transforms abstract concepts into structured, functional, and executable realities.
primary_archetype.brand_expression: We design systems that make architecture buildable.
primary_archetype.psychological_role: Eliminates uncertainty between design and execution

secondary_archetype.name: The Creator
secondary_archetype.definition: An entity that transforms ideas into tangible, structured, and meaningful forms.
secondary_archetype.brand_expression: We turn architectural intent into engineered reality.
secondary_archetype.psychological_role: Preserves architectural creativity within engineering constraints

supporting_archetypes.name: The Architect (Functional Archetype)
supporting_archetypes.role: Ensures spatial and structural logic in design translation

supporting_archetypes.name: The Builder (Execution Archetype)
supporting_archetypes.role: Ensures real-world constructability and installation reliability

psychological_positioning.user_perception_goal: This is a company that makes architecture buildable

communication_alignment.language_rule: No emotional exaggeration; only system-based communication

strategic_function.role: Defines behavioral DNA of the brand
strategic_function.impact: Ensures all visual, verbal, and system outputs remain aligned with engineering architecture identity
